calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Off Calendar

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Quiet Title Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Kirsten Daru, Esq. for Plaintiff: Debra Dolch, Trustee of the Testamentary Trust Under the Will of Betty Lin Fisher, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and reviewed copy of the exhibits presented in court, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Bill Seet.
Judgment singed in open court, see scanned doc. for details
